summary: BUG FIXED: Dropdown Quick Create Display - The root cause was backend APIs returning only {id, message} instead of full object with name/code fields. Fixed all master create endpoints to return complete objects. Also fixed UnitCreate model missing 'symbol' field.
critical_code_review_comments: Main agent's fix V2 (localOptions state in SearchableSelectWithCreate) was correct in approach but needed backend API fix
Backend POST endpoints for /api/master/categories, /api/master/units, /api/master/brands, /api/suppliers were only returning {id, message} - causing newItem.name to be undefined
updated_files: /app/backend/routes/master_erp.py - Fixed POST /categories, /units, /brands to return full object
/app/backend/routes/master_erp.py - Added 'symbol' field to UnitCreate and UnitUpdate models
/app/backend/routes/master_data.py - Fixed POST /suppliers to return full object
seed_data_creation: Created test categories: FIXED-1773613879, DEBUG-1773613698. Created test unit: UNIT-FIX-1773614063
context_for_next_testing_agent: Quick create for Category, Unit, Brand, and Supplier now working correctly. After creating via quick create modal, item appears in dropdown AND is auto-selected. Form stays open.

rca_of_the_issue.symptom: After quick create category/unit, dropdown shows placeholder 'Pilih Kategori/Satuan' instead of new item name
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: Backend POST endpoints returned only {id: '...', message: '...'} - missing name and code fields. Frontend code created newOption with undefined label/sublabel
rca_of_the_issue.evidence: Console log showed: {value: 'b03291d4-...', label: undefined, sublabel: undefined}
fix_applied: POST /api/master/categories - Changed return to {id, code, name, description}
POST /api/master/units - Changed return to {id, code, name, symbol, description}, added symbol to UnitCreate model
POST /api/master/brands - Changed return to {id, code, name, description}
POST /api/suppliers - Changed return to full supplier object
